payload.answer: Cannot run `/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards` because `BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false`. No SQL was executed and no memory state should be inferred from this request. If you need inspection, enable debug SQL or use supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoints if available.
citations: Requested command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution is needed for an admin SQL debug request.

details: Admin SQL execution is disabled by configuration.
No durable memory was created or modified.

repair_options: Set `BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true` and retry the SQL command.
Use a supported non-SQL debug or inspection command to view memory cards.
If this was only contextual information, provide the actual task to evaluate instead of the disabled SQL command.
